title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple unveiled a rebuilt Siri AI assistant at WWDC 2026 with personal context, screen awareness, visual intelligence, and writing tools integrated across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. The new Siri reportedly uses Google Gemini technology and faces EU regulatory delays and muted investor reception.
writeup: The video covers Apple's rebuilt Siri assistant, unveiled at WWDC 2026, which reportedly runs on Google Gemini technology. The new Siri adds personal context, screen awareness, visual intelligence, and writing tools across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. It matters because it signals Apple leaning on an outside model for its assistant rather than relying solely on in-house systems. The summary also notes EU regulatory delays and a muted investor reception.
